chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1377 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 02.4.2026 Mr. Rustam Khan Mahar advocate for the petitioner Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, Assistant AG Mr. Ghulam Akbar Lashari advocate for the respondent / SBCA Mr. Aakash Mustafa advocate for the SBCA Ms. Tatheera Fatima advocate for the respondent No.4 / K-Electric Mr. Waseem Akhtar advocate for respondent No.5 / SSGC Mr. Muhammad Ijaz, Assistant Manager, CRD Department SSGC Raja Love Kush, Deputy Manager, Legal Department, SSGC Mr. Abdul Rasool, A.D. Lyari, SBCA --------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that vide order dated 21.11.2023, utility agencies were directed to disconnect services, and the Deputy Commissioner and SSP concerned were directed to ensure implementation and maintain law and order. Today, SBCA submitted a compliance report stating that demolition action could not be executed on 01.04.2026 as the building was neither vacated nor utility services fully disconnected. Fresh ejectment notices have been issued and reminders sent to utility agencies, Deputy Commissioner, and SSP for necessary action. Learned counsel for SSGC and K-Electric submitted that gas and electricity connections have been disconnected. In view of the above, substantial compliance has been made; accordingly, the petition stands disposed of, with directions to the respondents to proceed further in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
